summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 Phase 8 - Automated WhatsApp Matching Engine. All 17 backend pytest tests passed. Testing covered calculateMatchScore scoring logic, trigger mechanisms for candidate/job creation, notification API filters, message format validation, and threshold enforcement.

calculateMatchScore Tests.Perfect match (100% - all attributes mat: PASS - Score >= 75% with Education, English, Experience, Role Category matched
calculateMatchScore Tests.Zero match (nothing matches): PASS - Below 50% threshold, no notification created
calculateMatchScore Tests.Partial category match (keyword in summa: PASS - Partial role credit (10/25 pts) awarded

Data Integrity Tests.All required fields present in outgoing_: PASS - type, recipient_type, recipient_id, message, match_score, matched_fields, missing_fields, status, created_at

passed_tests: calculateMatchScore: Perfect match (same education, english, experience, category) scores ~100%
calculateMatchScore: Correctly identifies missing fields and returns them in missing array
calculateMatchScore: Returns low score/no notification when nothing matches
calculateMatchScore: Handles partial category match (candidate summary contains job keyword)
TRIGGER: Manual candidate via POST /nextapi/upload-audio triggers onCandidateCreatedOrUpdated
TRIGGER: Creates employer_match_alert entries in outgoing_log
TRIGGER: Job via POST /nextapi/jobs triggers onJobCreated
TRIGGER: Creates candidate_job_alert entries in outgoing_log
THRESHOLD: Employer alerts only fire for matches >50%
THRESHOLD: Candidate alerts only fire for matches >70%
API: GET /nextapi/notifications returns all notifications with stats
API: GET /nextapi/notifications?type=employer_match_alert filters correctly
API: GET /nextapi/notifications?type=candidate_job_alert filters correctly
API: GET /nextapi/notifications?candidate_id=<id> filters by candidate
API: GET /nextapi/notifications?job_id=<id> filters by job
MESSAGE FORMAT: Employer message contains required components
MESSAGE FORMAT: Candidate message contains required components
DATA INTEGRITY: outgoing_log entries have all required fields
REGRESSION: /nextapi/jobs API works (200)
REGRESSION: /nextapi/candidates API works (200)

mocked_integrations.WhatsApp Notifications: MOCKED - Notifications are logged to outgoing_log MongoDB collection instead of sending real WhatsApp messages. Status field is set to 'queued' but no actual delivery occurs.

seed_data_creation: Created test jobs and candidates with prefixes MATCH_TEST_, TRIGGER_TEST_, THRESH_TEST_, MSG_TEST_ for matching engine testing. These are created with specific education/english/experience combinations to verify scoring thresholds.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Phase 8 Automated WhatsApp Matching Engine fully tested. Backend test file: /app/getlocal/tests/test_matching_engine_v1.py. Key verified behaviors:
1. calculateMatchScore uses weighted scoring: Education 25%, English 20%, Experience 30%, Category 25%
2. Education/English use hierarchical comparison (candidate >= job requirement = match)
3. Category supports exact match + partial keyword match from professional_summary (10pts partial credit)
4. onCandidateCreatedOrUpdated triggers for manual entries at line 355 in upload-audio/route.js
5. onJobCreated triggers at line 94 in jobs/route.js
6. Notifications stored in outgoing_log collection with status='queued'
7. WhatsApp delivery is MOCKED (logged to DB, not actually sent)

Notification Stats: 225 total (148 employer alerts, 77 candidate alerts)
